problem: What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: If Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating is applied to and, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
